description: Mortgage and Deed of Trust Recording — records mortgage instruments, assignments, modifications, and subordination agreements with lien priority tracking

hard_stops.label: MERS MIN Number Invalid
hard_stops.logic: Mortgage references MERS (Mortgage Electronic Registration System) but the MIN number is not valid in MERS registry

hard_stops.label: Borrower Not Vested Owner
hard_stops.logic: Borrower named on the mortgage/deed of trust is not the vested owner of the property — mortgage cannot encumber property not owned by borrower

hard_stops.label: Recording Fee Not Collected
hard_stops.logic: Mortgage recording fee and any applicable mortgage tax have not been collected — cannot record without payment

soft_flags.label: High Loan-to-Value Ratio
soft_flags.logic: Loan amount exceeds 80% of the assessed property value — flag for mortgage insurance verification
